summary: Transfer Selection Feature Testing COMPLETE. Backend API filtering works correctly (9/9 tests passed). Frontend transfer selection workflow fully functional: City autocomplete shows country, Transfer buttons appear on Day 1 (Arrival) and Return Day (Departure), Modal shows only Dubai transfers when Dubai is destination, Selected transfer displays on day card with details, Transfer price included in total.

issues: React hydration warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <select>' - cosmetic issue from dynamic rendering, does not affect functionality

city_autocomplete.selection_works: PASS - Clicking selects city for destination

trip_builder_arrival_transfer.button_visible_day1: PASS - 'Select Transfer' button appears on Day 1 (Arrival at Dubai)
trip_builder_arrival_transfer.opens_modal: PASS - Clicking button opens Transfer Selection Modal

trip_builder_departure_transfer.return_day_visible: PASS - Return Day (Day 3 for 2-night trip) shows orange header
trip_builder_departure_transfer.button_visible_return_day: PASS - 'Select Transfer' button appears on Return Day
trip_builder_departure_transfer.opens_modal: PASS - Clicking button opens Departure Transfer Modal (orange header)

transfer_selection_modal.modal_opens: PASS - Modal opens with correct header
transfer_selection_modal.filters_by_city: PASS - Shows only 4 Dubai transfers (Tbilisi transfer excluded)
transfer_selection_modal.shows_transfer_details: PASS - Transfer type, vehicle type, duration, bags, price, pick-up times displayed

transfer_display_on_day_card.shows_title: PASS - Shows 'Private from Dubai International Airport'
transfer_display_on_day_card.button_changes_to_change: PASS - Button text changes from 'Select Transfer' to 'Change'

pricing_integration.total_updated: PASS - Total Price updates to include transfer cost

backend_api_filtering.all_transfers: PASS - /api/transfers returns transfers from multiple cities

critical_code_review_comments: Transfer filtering correctly uses city parameter in backend API
Frontend properly fetches transfers by destination city when Trip Builder loads
Transfer selection state properly maintained for arrival and departure separately
Price calculation correctly sums arrival and departure transfer prices
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Dubai transfers seeded by backend
context_for_next_testing_agent: Transfer Selection feature is fully functional. Flow: Login -> Book FIT Package -> Select Dubai destination -> Create Proposal -> Trip Builder shows transfer selection. 4 Dubai transfers available. Backend test: /app/backend/tests/test_transfer_selection.py
dubai_transfers_available: Private from Dubai International Airport - 88 AED (Sedan)
